nasb.text: He who has clean hands and a pure heart, Who has not lifted up his soul to falsehood And has not sworn deceitfully.

esv.text: He who has clean hands and a pure heart, who does not lift up his soul to what is false and does not swear deceitfully.

cnv.text: 就是手潔心清的人， 他不傾向虛妄， 起誓不懷詭詐。

ccb.text: 只有那些手洁心清， 不拜假神，不起假誓的人。

csbs.text: 就是双手清白、心里纯洁的人， 他的心不倾向虚妄， 他也不起假誓。
